title: My opinion about the 2 most confusing rebuild things
display_title: My opinion about the 2 most confusing rebuild things
wikitext: []: My opinion about the 2 most confusing rebuild things             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Sun Sep 12, 2021 10:47 am My interpretation is that there is a cycle only in the rebuild dimension (Kaworu is stuck in a loop in the reconstruction), if not the coffins with the seele logo shown in 3.0 + 1.0 (the golgota object shapes the memories of the people, in this case Kaworu), if not, it wouldn't make sense (in 1.0 there are 9 coffins on the moon, but they have a summoning or awakening function for kaworu). It is possible that the souls have permanence (that is, they are the same in each cycle or dimension), this would make it possible for kaworu, Shinji and Rei to be aware of other cycles (their soul is always the same in each story), and they classify as memories. Kaworu tells Shinji that he wrote his name in the book of life, we don't know if it only applies to rebuilding cycles (like a book with different pages). This would also explain why shikinami is not aware of EoE (they never show us, the others do seem to be aware) because they do not have the same soul, they are different. Gendo in 3.0 + 1.0 is no longer human, he has in his possession the key, which allows him to see beyond his reality, he is aware of the different cycles and dimensions (hence his knowledge of the Shinji of the NGE dimension) The Spear of Cassius possibly does not exist, just as shikinami and Mari do not exist in NGE. There is no restart at the end of NGE or EoE, only in Rebuild at the time of instrumentalization of each specific cycle The manga is canon in its own continuity, it is not related to NGE or RoE (plus Mari in the manga contradicts RoE) The ending is ambiguous, they seem to be in the antiverse yet (14 years have not passed, otherwise the choker would not make sense), but the Fate of Shinji and Mari, if they are going to be reunited with their friends and loved ones, is Uncertain. Write your thoughts
